sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n12316" key="a)pobroxiste/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀποβροχ-ιστέον</orth>, <sense id="n12316.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must make a ligature,</tr_> Arching. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:47:13:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">47.13.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
